login.voiceCheckBody: After your PIN, you'll say a short passphrase so Bede knows it's really you.
login.quote: "The sole true end of education is simply this: to teach men how to teach themselves." — Dorothy L. Sayers, <italic>The Lost Tools of Learning</italic>
login.voiceNamePrompt: Enter your name for the voice check:

tutorSession.feedbackTooltip: Tell us what's working and what isn't
tutorSession.finishedLearningTime: {{name}}, you have finished your learning time for today.
tutorSession.eyeRestBreakBody: {{name}}, that's enough screen time for now.
tutorSession.eyeRestBreakDuration: This break is at least {{minutes}} minutes — step away from the screen.
tutorSession.breakTimeInstructions: Step away from the screen. Be with nature, rest your eyes, or spend a quiet moment with God.
tutorSession.summarySubtitle: Prepared by Bede · for your records
tutorSession.unableToGenerateSummary: Unable to generate summary — check your API connection.
tutorSession.sentTo: Sent to {{email}}. This address wasn't saved anywhere.
tutorSession.emailDisclaimer: An informal impression from today's session, not an official evaluation. Used once to send this email, never stored, and never shown to your student.

chat.drawingReady: Drawing ready. Add a note, or just send it.
chat.uploadNarration: Upload narration from your notebook (e.g. inq)
chat.micHoldListening: Listening… let go when you're done
chat.micYourTurn: Your turn — press and hold to talk
chat.placeholderOnBreak: On a break. Bede will be here when you return.
chat.placeholderHoldListening: Listening… let go when you're done
chat.placeholderYourTurn: Your turn — press and hold the mic to talk
chat.placeholderTypeOrMic: Type or tap the mic to speak…
chat.placeholderShareThoughts: Share your thoughts or answer Bede's question…
chat.hintHoldToTalk: Enter to send · press and hold the mic, then talk
chat.hintEnterOnly: Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
chat.nextSubjectFallback: Let's move on to our next subject!

podDashboard.title: Today's Pod
podDashboard.studentCount_one: {{count}} student · Open each session on their tablet
podDashboard.studentCount_other: {{count}} students · Open each session on their tablet
podDashboard.sandboxTooltip: Ask Bede directly — for testing, not for students
podDashboard.firstSessionNudge_one: Based on their first session — see what Bede noticed and what's suggested next.
podDashboard.firstSessionNudge_other: Based on their first sessions — see what Bede noticed and what's suggested next.
podDashboard.howToStart: How to start a student's session
podDashboard.step1: Copy the session link for that student.
podDashboard.step2: Open the link on their tablet (or paste into their browser).
podDashboard.step3: The student logs in with the shared PIN, then says the voice passphrase.
podDashboard.step4: Their Bede session starts automatically with their subjects.
podDashboard.independentSessions: All sessions run independently — multiple students can be active at the same time.
podDashboard.deleteConfirmBody: This removes {{name}} from today's pod AND deletes everything Bede has stored for them — narration history, learner profile, math mastery tracking, session transcripts, and voice enrollment. This cannot be undone.
podDashboard.deleteFailed: Failed to delete this student's data

parentSetup.title: Plan Today's Pod
parentSetup.subtitle: Add each student, then open their session on their tablet
parentSetup.usageEstimateTooltip: Estimate on your own Anthropic API key — see console.anthropic.com for exact billing
parentSetup.hitlConsent: I understand that Bede is an AI assistant that supports, not replaces, my role as primary educator. I remain responsible for my child's curriculum, wellbeing, and learning outcomes. I have reviewed today's plan and it reflects my intentions.
parentSetup.saveFailed: Failed to save — check your connection.
parentSetup.sexHelpNamed: Needed so Bede addresses {{name}} with the correct grammatical gender in this language.
parentSetup.sexHelpUnnamed: Needed so Bede addresses your child with the correct grammatical gender in the configured language.
parentSetup.voiceVerificationOn: Student says passphrase at session start
parentSetup.appearanceLockedOn: This student cannot change the theme or bubble color.
parentSetup.appearanceLockedOff: This student may change the theme and bubble color.
parentSetup.sessionLengthHelp: The session ends when this time is up. The default is two hours and the most allowed is four. Learners rest for ten minutes after every hour.
parentSetup.screenTimeOn: Mandatory eye-rest break after {{minutes}} min on screen
parentSetup.screenTimeOff: Off — only the grade-based block/break cycle applies
parentSetup.termMasterySuffix: exposure to all topics, mastery of up to 3 per area
parentSetup.termTopicsHelp: Bede weaves these into lessons, tracks each learner's progress on them, and shows you where they stand on the Progress page — the child never sees them as objectives.
parentSetup.noteForBedePlaceholder: e.g. Focus on multiplication facts 6–9 today.

progress.noMathMasteryData: No math mastery data yet. This builds silently as {{name}} works through math sessions with Bede — check back after a session or two.
progress.mathMasteryCalibration_one: Bede is still forming a first picture of how {{name}} approaches math, based on {{count}} observation so far — treat this as an early signal, not a settled read. It will sharpen the more {{name}} works with Bede.
progress.mathMasteryCalibration_other: Bede is still forming a first picture of how {{name}} approaches math, based on {{count}} observations so far — treat this as an early signal, not a settled read. It will sharpen the more {{name}} works with Bede.
progress.noUsageYet: No usage recorded yet for this student. This tracks tokens spent on your own Anthropic API key as sessions happen — check back after a session or two.
progress.usageFooter_one: Reflects {{count}} recorded interaction with Bede — usage naturally tracks how often this student uses sessions. Bede runs on your own Anthropic API key and is never billed to Bede itself; this is a best-effort estimate, not a bill — see console.anthropic.com for exact billing.
progress.usageFooter_other: Reflects {{count}} recorded interactions with Bede — usage naturally tracks how often this student uses sessions. Bede runs on your own Anthropic API key and is never billed to Bede itself; this is a best-effort estimate, not a bill — see console.anthropic.com for exact billing.
progress.behaviorCheckKinesthetic_one: Since being profiled as a kinesthetic learner on {{since}}, Bede has invited hands-on drawing or writing {{count}} time.
progress.behaviorCheckKinesthetic_other: Since being profiled as a kinesthetic learner on {{since}}, Bede has invited hands-on drawing or writing {{count}} times.
progress.behaviorCheckReadingWriting_one: Since being profiled as a reading/writing learner on {{since}}, Bede has invited written narration {{count}} time.
progress.behaviorCheckReadingWriting_other: Since being profiled as a reading/writing learner on {{since}}, Bede has invited written narration {{count}} times.
progress.behaviorCheckVisual_one: Since being profiled as a visual learner on {{since}}, Bede has shown a visual aid {{count}} time (only available in subjects with one, like Art & Music or History).
progress.behaviorCheckVisual_other: Since being profiled as a visual learner on {{since}}, Bede has shown a visual aid {{count}} times (only available in subjects with one, like Art & Music or History).
progress.completeSessionToUnlock: Complete a session to unlock Bede's initial recommendations for this student.
progress.tentativeRead_one: Bede has observed {{count}} session so far and can share an initial, tentative read — this will sharpen as more sessions accumulate.
progress.tentativeRead_other: Bede has observed {{count}} sessions so far and can share an initial, tentative read — this will sharpen as more sessions accumulate.
progress.readyToSynthesize: Bede has observed {{count}} sessions and is ready to synthesise a learner profile.
progress.noNarrationsYet: No narrations recorded yet — Bede will score narrations automatically during sessions.
progress.noMasteryTopicsSet: No mastery topics set for this term yet. Add up to 3 topics per core area in Setup — Bede will weave them into lessons and track each learner's progress here.
progress.title: Progress

breakActivities: Look at something at least 20 feet away for 20 seconds — it gives your eyes a real rest.
Step outside if you can. Find one living thing, like a bird or a leaf, and really look at it for a minute.
Take a quiet moment to thank God for one thing you learned or noticed today.
Do 15 jumping jacks or stretch your arms up over your head.
Look out a window at the sky. What are the clouds doing right now? Which way is the wind blowing?
Mental math: what is 17 + 26? Try it without writing it down.
Pray a slow Our Father, paying attention to one phrase you usually rush past.
Name five animals whose names start with the letter B.
Find something outside worth drawing later. Remember it for your nature notebook.
Walk to another room and back before you sit down again.
Close your eyes gently and roll your shoulders back ten times.
Sit still for one quiet minute. God speaks in the silence. Just listen.
Mental math: what is 9 x 7? Say the answer out loud.
Think of a word that rhymes with "light" — how many can you find?
Step outside or to a window and take five slow, deep breaths.
Mental math: if you have 3 dozen eggs, how many eggs is that?
